title: More Vulkan
description: This modpack replaces the rendering engine with Vulkan, which is more efficient than both OpenGL or Sodium on modern hardware. Along with extra optimizations.
body:
**This modpack aims to increase performance by replacing Minecraft's laughably inefficient rendering engine, OpenGL, with a more modern approach: Vulkan. This can increase your performance by upwards of 100% depending on your hardware, especially when paired with other popular optimization mods like Lithium!**

* Although Vulkan **IS** coming to Java Edition natively, VulkanMod is still far better than native Vulkan as of right now especially when paired with a suite of 20+ performance mods and small QoL tweaks like 3D Skin Layers, Zoomify, Chat Heads, and Chat Animations.

**Performance Results (Based on my hardware configuration):**

* 920 FPS **without** More Vulkan (and not as stable)
* 2000+ FPS **with** More Vulkan (and it is much more stable)

*These results were achieved on a setup featuring an RTX 5060, Intel Core Ultra 5 225F, and 6GB of RAM allocated to Minecraft. Tested on Windows 11 with Nvidia drivers 596.21.*

Report any issues in my Discord server! [https://discord.gg/8yNhd8Z8gj](https://discord.gg/8yNhd8Z8gj)

---

### Simple FAQ

* **Will downports be coming?** Not for versions below 1.21.11.
* **Is this modpack going to stay updated?** It depends on how much free time I have and how well the pack performs for others.
* **I have other questions!** Join my Discord server using the link above.
